use_cases: Displaying loading state during asynchronous data fetching operations
Indicating processing time during form submissions or API calls
Showing temporary wait states during page navigation or transitions
Visual feedback during file uploads or content loading
Placeholder feedback while dynamic content renders
ai_summary: A 3D-effect loading spinner composed of 12 animated dots arranged in a grid pattern with CSS 3D transforms. The component displays a 'Loading...' text indicator and uses continuous keyframe animations to create a dimensional pulse effect. Designed as a lightweight atomic feedback component for any application needing visual loading indicators.
